news.t: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: CVLC is an equity ETF with a total of 785 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.00%, Apple at 6.38%, Alphabet at 5.80%, Microsoft at 4.09%, and Amazon.com at 3.47%.

overview.description: The Calvert US Large-Cap Core Responsible Index ETF (CVLC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted, ESG-screened index of US large-cap stocks. CVLC was launched on Jan 30, 2023 and is issued by Morgan Stanley.
infoTable: Calvert US Large-Cap Core Responsible Index

data.title: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: Morgan Stanley MS +1.02% is expanding further into retail investing with its first exchange-traded funds, but faces a crowded field where legions of ETFs struggle to gain traction.
